name: AWS Lambda functions with deprecated runtimes
query:
{
  functions(
    where: {
      cloudProvider: { eq: "aws" }
      runtime_IN: [
        "nodejs20.x"
        "ruby3.2"
        "nodejs18.x"
        "python3.9"
        "dotnet6"
        "python3.8"
        "nodejs16.x"
        "java8"
        "go1.x"
        "provided"
        "ruby2.7"
        "nodejs14.x"
        "python3.7"
        "dotnetcore3.1"
        "nodejs12.x"
        "python3.6"
        "dotnetcore2.1"
        "nodejs10.x"
        "ruby2.5"
        "python2.7"
        "nodejs8.10"
        "nodejs4.3"
        "nodejs4.3-edge"
        "nodejs6.10"
        "dotnetcore1.0"
        "dotnetcore2.0"
      ]
    }
  ) {
    ...AssetFragment
    runtime
  }
}
